meta.professor_methodology: Draw diagrams, write equation, differentiate with respect to time
meta.description: Finding rates of change using implicit differentiation with respect to time

patterns.name: Related Rates Setup
patterns.recognition_signal: How fast is... changing? Rate word problem
patterns.logic: Write equation relating variables, differentiate with respect to t, substitute

worked_example.title: Ladder Problem
worked_example.problem_latex: \text{10-ft ladder slides away at 1 ft/s. Find top's speed when bottom is 6 ft from wall.}

solution_steps.reasoning: x from wall, y up wall

confidence_checklist: I can draw and label diagrams
I can write equations relating variables
I can differentiate with respect to time
I can solve for unknown rates
